name: homebridge-mhi-wfrac
description: A homebridge plugin for Mitshubishi WF-RAC aircos (using the Smart M-Air app)

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.watch: npm run build && npm link && nodemon
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.dev:setup: npm run dev:setup-dirs && npm run dev:setup-config && npm run dev:setup-ui
scripts.dev:setup-ui: cd dev-homebridge && (test -f package.json || npm init -y) && npm install homebridge-config-ui-x
scripts.dev: npm run dev:setup && npm run build && npm link && HOMEBRIDGE_CONFIG_PATH=./dev-homebridge HOMEBRIDGE_STORAGE_PATH=./dev-homebridge npx homebridge -D
scripts.dev:watch: npm run dev:setup && npm run build && npm link && nodemon
